name: Riley Chen
resume_text:
Riley Chen
Email: riley.chen.eval@example.com
People Operations Specialist, Luma Analytics, 2021-2025
Managed onboarding checklists for monthly new-hire cohorts, maintained BambooHR records, coordinated benefits enrollment questions, and routed employee relations intake to the HR business partner with confidential notes. Updated policy acknowledgements and prepared manager FAQ drafts for performance review cycles.
Office Coordinator, Luma Analytics, 2019-2021
Supported employee documentation and vendor scheduling.
Skills: BambooHR, onboarding, benefits coordination, employee relations intake, policy documentation.
expected_risks: Limited evidence of independent manager coaching
human_notes: Relevant HR generalist-adjacent background; interview should validate judgment and independence.
